file: 1314_Jiao 等 - 2014 - Catalytic Cracking of RP-3 Jet Fuel over PtCeO2 –Al2 O3 by Adding.txt

experiments.description: 在3.5 MPa压力、600-750°C温度范围内，使用PCA、PCA+CZ和CZ三种催化剂，对中国3号喷气燃料（RP-3）进行催化裂解实验，评估催化活性和热稳定性
experiments.text_snippet: Catalytic cracking of Chinese number 3 jet fuel (RP-3) was used to examine the catalytic activities and thermal stabilities of the as-prepared catalysts... The catalytic performance measurement was carried out from 600 to 750 °C, and the pressure was kept at 3.5 MPa.

Product yield.original: {'Gas yield': ['56.9% at 750°C for PCA+CZ', 'Increased by 284%, 33%, 64% at 600, 650, 700°C respectively for PCA vs thermal', 'Increased by ~30% at each temperature for PCA+CZ vs PCA'], 'Liquid product distribution': 'Reported in Table 2 of the text (mass percentages of alkenes, alkanes, cycloalkanes, arenes at 600, 650, 700°C)'}

Catalyst stability.original: {'Thermal stability': ['PCA+CZ had better high-temperature stabilities (>650 °C) compared to other catalysts', 'Rapid deactivation of CZ at 700 °C due to poor stabilities under high temperatures', 'PCA inhibits crystallization and collapse of CZ pore structure at high temperatures'], 'Coking': ['Carbon deposition blocked microchannel for CZ catalytic cracking at 700°C', 'Passivation of inner wall decreased carbon deposition for thermal cracking']}

experiments.text_snippet: Catalytic cracking of Chinese number 3 jet fuel (RP-3) was used to examine the catalytic activities and thermal stabilities of the as-prepared catalysts... The catalytic performance measurement was carried out from 600 to 750 °C, and the pressure was kept at 3.5 MPa.
